displayTitle: Dark Empire #3: The Battle for Calamari
synopsis: A war for the planet Calamari erupts over that planet's surface, already threatened by the massive World Destroyers. While Lando and Wedge take on the Imperial stormtroopers, Leia is tormented by visions of Luke being sucked into the darkness. Meanwhile, it seems that Han has run into some "old friends"!
title: Dark Empire #3: The Battle for Calamari
